name: Prisma Cloud
description: Palo Alto Networks CNAPP platform providing CSPM, CWPP, code security, and cloud infrastructure protection via REST API

auth_config.note: POST to /login with {username, password} to obtain JWT token, then use as x-redlock-auth header

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve a list of alerts filtered by time range, policy, severity, and status

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Get detailed information about a specific Prisma Cloud alert by ID

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all security policies including built-in and custom policies

parameters.name: policy.severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (high, medium, low, critical)

parameters.name: cloud.type
parameters.description: Filter by cloud type (aws, azure, gcp, alibaba_cloud, oci)

actions.name: Get Compliance Posture
actions.description: Retrieve compliance posture statistics for a given compliance standard

parameters.name: timeUnit
parameters.description: Time unit (hour, day, week, month, year, epoch, login)

actions.name: Search Assets
actions.description: Search cloud assets using RQL (Resource Query Language) for configuration, network, or event queries

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: RQL query string (e.g., "config from cloud.resource where cloud.type = 'aws' AND api.name = 'aws-ec2-describe-instances'")

actions.name: List Cloud Accounts
actions.description: List all onboarded cloud accounts and their monitoring status

parameters.name: cloudType
parameters.description: Filter by cloud type (aws, azure, gcp, alibaba_cloud, oci)

actions.name: List Vulnerabilities
actions.description: Retrieve vulnerability findings across workloads and images

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

actions.name: Dismiss Alert
actions.description: Dismiss one or more alerts with a reason and optional dismissal note

parameters.name: alerts
parameters.description: Array of alert IDs to dismiss

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter criteria to select alerts for bulk dismissal
